SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:22am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Florencia I. Dancel, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Eduardo B. Magalong, appears in Pro Per. Ms. Dancel is present with a Tagalog interpreter, Caroline Carrera, who is sworn to interpret Tagalog into English.
Parties and witnesses previously sworn testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
